class.name: UserLogoutWebPage
class.brief_description: A web page that logs out a [User] by visiting it.
class.description: A web page that logs out a [User] by visiting it. It unsets the [User]'s session cookie.

members.member: Whether to render the menu or not. This [UserWebPage] needs to render the menu delayed compared to the others.

signal.name: user_logged_out
signal.description: Emitted when a [User] gets logged out.
